title: Proclamation No. 526, s. 2004
text:
PROCLAMATION NO. 526

RESERVING FOR RESIDENTIAL PURPOSES CERTAIN PORTIONS OF THE LOTS COVERED BY TRANSFER CERTIFICATE OF TITLE (TCT) NOS. 127409 AND 416720 ISSUED IN THE NAME OF THE REPUBLIC OF THE PHILIPPINES UNDER THE ADMINISTRATION OF THE DEPARTMENT OF PUBLIC WORKS AND HIGHWAYS (DPWH), SITUATED IN BARANGAY DELA PAZ, CITY OF ANTIPOLO, ISLAND OF LUZON, AND DECLARING THE SAME OPEN FOR DISPOSITION UNDER THE PROVISIONS OF ACT 3038, IN RELATION TO THE PROVISIONS OF CA 141, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE PUBLIC LAND ACT, AS AMENDED

Upon recommendation of the Secretary of Environment and Natural Resources, and pursuant to the authority vested in me by law, I, GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO, President of the Philippines do hereby reserve for residential purposes certain portions of the lots covered by Transfer Certificate of Title (TCT) Nos. 127409 and 416720 issued in the name of the Republic of the Philippines under the administration of the Department of Public Works and Highways (DPWH) situated in Barangay dela Paz, City of Antipolo, Island of Luzon, containing an aggregate area of Twenty Six Thousand Eight Hundred Six (26,806) square meters , and declaring the same open for disposition under the provisions of Republic Act No. 3038, in relation to the provisions of the CA 141 otherwise known as the Public Land Act , as amended, in favor of the actual occupants thereof represented by the Samahang Mahihirap sa Daang Bakal, Inc., which portions are identified as Lot Nos. 1-211 and 213-254 all of Plan Pcs-04-014449, the technical descriptions of which are made integral part hereof as Annexes 1 to 253.

All corners of the lots are marked on the ground P.S. Cyl. Con. Mon. 15 x 60 cm. Bearings True; date of original survey, November 17–29, 1913 and the subdivision survey was undertaken by Noel B. Akilit, Geodetic Engineer, on June 2–5 and 17–19, 1998 and approved on December 23, 1999. The portions of the land herein declared for disposition are subject to relocation survey.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

DONE in the City of Manila, this 5th day of January, in the year of Our Lord, Two Thousand and Four.

Source: CDAsia
